ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coding_systems" (
  "coding_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coding system */,
  "coding_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the coding system (e.g., OXMIS, Read) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coding system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the coding system */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the coding system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the coding system (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coding_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic code */,
  "coding_system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coding system used */,
  "code" TEXT /* The specific diagnostic code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnostic code */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity the code represents (e.g., diagnosis, procedure) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the diagnostic code (e.g., diagnostic) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the diagnostic code */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the diagnostic code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_codes_coding_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("coding_system_id") REFERENCES coding_systems ("coding_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_hierarchy" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic code */,
  "parent_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent code in the hierarchy */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the code in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_hierarchy_parent_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_code_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., medical coder, healthcare provider) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic code being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the code was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic code being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_configurations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
